sentences.arabic: يُعْتَبَرُ الْمُعَلِّمُونَ صُنَّاعَ الْمُسْتَقْبَلِ، حَيْثُ يَقُومُونَ بِتَشْكِيلِ عُقُولِ الْأَجْيَالِ الْقَادِمَةِ.
sentences.translation: Nastavnici se smatraju tvorcima budućnosti, jer oni oblikuju umove budućih generacija.
sentences.translationEn: Teachers are considered the creators of the future, as they shape the minds of future generations.

sentences.arabic: يَتَجَاوَزُ دَوْرُهُمْ تَقْدِيمَ الْمَعْلُومَاتِ إِلَى إِلْهَامِ الطُّلَّابِ لِتَحْقيقِ أَقْصَى إِمْكَانَاتِهِمْ.
sentences.translation: Njihova uloga nadilazi pružanje informacija ka inspirisanju učenika da ostvare svoj puni potencijal.
sentences.translationEn: Their role goes beyond providing information to inspiring students to achieve their full potential.

sentences.arabic: يُشَجِّعُ الْمُرَبِّي النَّاجِحُ عَلَى التَّسَاؤُلِ وَيَزْرَعُ فِي نُفُوسِ تَلَامِيذِهِ حُبَّ الِاكْتِشَافِ.
sentences.translation: Uspješan odgajatelj podstiče na propitivanje i sadi ljubav prema otkrivanju u duše svojih učenika.
sentences.translationEn: A successful educator encourages questioning and plants a love for discovery in the souls of their students.

sentences.arabic: تُرَكِّزُ الْمَنَاهِجُ الْحَدِيثَةُ عَلَى أَهَمِّيَّةِ التَّحْلِيلِ النَّقْدِيِّ بَدَلًا مِنَ التَّلْقِينِ وَالْحِفْظِ.
sentences.translation: Moderni nastavni planovi fokusiraju se na važnost kritičke analize umjesto na puko predavanje i memorisanje.
sentences.translationEn: Modern curricula focus on the importance of critical analysis instead of rote instruction and memorization.

sentences.arabic: لِذَلِكَ، فَإِنَّ الِاسْتِثْمَارَ فِي تَدْرِيبِ الْمُعَلِّمِينَ هُوَ حَجَرُ الزَّاوِيَةِ لِأَيِّ إِصْلَاحٍ تَعْلِيمِيٍّ.
sentences.translation: Stoga je ulaganje u obuku nastavnika kamen temeljac bilo koje obrazovne reforme.
sentences.translationEn: Therefore, investing in teacher training is the cornerstone of any educational reform.
